title: TPARequestGUI
description: A lightweight GUI for EssentialsX TPA requests.
body:
# TPARequestGUI
A lightweight GUI for EssentialsX TPA requests.

### Dependencies:
- [EssentialsX](https://essentialsx.net/)

### Usage:
- /tpagui [enable|disable|reload]

### Permissions:
- `tpagui.settings` Allows you to use /tpagui (Default: true)
- `tpagui.reload` Allows you to use /tpagui reload to reload the config (Default: op)

### Preview:
